hero.subtitle: We control the entire process — from bank negotiation to notarial closing. No bureaucracy. Individual, personal attention for every case.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Every situation is unique. So is every solution

buy.title: Property Purchase
buy.desc: We identify market opportunities for investors and private buyers. Every transaction is rigorously analysed to maximise your return.

sell.title: Mortgage Problem Solutions
sell.desc: We purchase mortgage debt and manage the property sale on our terms — without waiting for auctions. A dignified and fast exit with real liquidity for the owner.

sellProp.title: Property Sale
sellProp.desc: We manage the sale of your property from start to finish: valuation, marketing and notarial closing. Full transparency and the best market price.

advisory.title: Mortgage Advisory
advisory.desc: We negotiate with your bank to reduce your payment, term or rate. We also offer financial planning, mortgage shortening, insurance and utility management.

debt.label: Is this your situation?
debt.title: Your mortgage has a way out.
debt.titleAccent: Even if it doesn't seem like it right now.
debt.subtitle: When you signed your mortgage, no one explained what would happen if you couldn't pay. Our team explains it now — and resolves it.

scenarios.text: You have missed 3 or more monthly payments
The bank has started a foreclosure process
You have a shared mortgage from a divorce or separation
You inherited a property with associated debt
You are self-employed or a company with property debt
You want to sell before the bank takes action

debt.callout: You don't have to wait for the bank to foreclose. There is a dignified way out.

case.label: Real case
case.statDesc: in liquidity recovered for an owner with a property at auction
case.title:
Auction halted.
Property sold in 10 days.

steps.title: Active auction
steps.desc: The bank had started foreclosure proceedings. The owner believed there was no way out.

steps.title: Immediate intervention
steps.desc: Our team halted the auction and negotiated directly with the bank on the owner's behalf.

steps.title: Sold in 10 days
steps.desc: We marketed the property and closed the operation in record time with a qualified buyer.

steps.title: €40,000 to the owner
steps.desc: The client recovered real liquidity to start over. Dignity and financial freedom.

case.cta: Your case can have the same result
case.disclaimer: Real case managed by Novus Pre Ibérica S.L. Results vary depending on each specific situation.

howItWorks.title: How We Work
howItWorks.subtitle: Fast decisions, transparent process, no bureaucracy

steps.title: We assess your situation
steps.desc: Our advisor analyses your debt, the property and your banking situation — confidentially and at no cost. No formalities.

steps.title: Offer within 24–48 hours
steps.desc: We don't take weeks. Within 24 to 48 hours you have a concrete proposal on the table with clear terms and expected liquidity.

steps.title: We deal with the bank
steps.desc: You don't have to face the bank. Our team negotiates directly — the debt, the terms and the timeline.

steps.title: You close and recover liquidity
steps.desc: We manage all documentation, the notarial signing and the property transfer. You receive the money and start fresh.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Built to solve what others won't
about.p1: Novus Pre Ibérica was founded in 2025 with one clear mission: to resolve the most complex real estate operations in the Spanish market. Based in Valladolid and operating nationally, our team of specialists in law, finance and real estate handles every file individually — never as a production line.
about.p2: Our hallmark is unique: we don't wait for auctions. We purchase the debt and sell when we decide, giving the owner a real way out. If you are an investor, we guarantee the same rigour and transparency in every operation.

contact.title: Your case, our solution
contact.subtitle: Tell us your situation. Our advisor responds personally within 24 hours
contact.name: Full name
contact.message: Tell us the details of your case
contact.success: Enquiry received. Our advisor will contact you personally within 24 hours.
contact.promise: Every case is handled by a dedicated advisor — never a bot, never an unanswered form.

footer.tagline: Complex real estate operations resolved. Personal approach in every case.
